textByHash.04250458d850a4e1db1a47fb56729d40a0b47d59: I'd recommend the Colosseum. Me and a few associates always wager bets on the contenders.
textByHash.381875cef674fdc31bc9f2e476aa88f94b42766a: I wish I had moves like that!
textByHash.4cccfe7c36e00d8103a85ac5f2ff0b8a0b42e4fb: Hello. How are you liking the city?
textByHash.5ec1221c117dd64b6a5f5446aba44cfc18d70655: No! We don't care for begging in the city!
textByHash.64e3cbe809e2c78e1a70a62e267b2a4abc2fe9d5: Who taught you to move like that?
textByHash.b1f19da2dbb5342b00e4cc580fdbe372bffc59cc: As you can tell, I'm doing quite well winning! Plenty of coin to pass around.
textByHash.fb2be31d8a836be3617c01a66715010e214e34c5: I'll keep you company for a moment.
